privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Chrome profile with 23 initial bookmarks injected via setup_task.sh. The agent must organize 16 professional OSINT bookmarks into 4 specific folders ('Sanctions & Watchlists', 'Corporate Registries', 'Intelligence Databases', 'Asset Tracking') and delete the 7 personal bookmarks (Facebook, Pinterest, Amazon, Netflix, Spotify, Expedia, TripAdvisor). Additionally, the task requires adding 3 custom search engines ('oc' for OpenCorporates, 'icij' for Offshore Leaks, 'ofac' for OFAC), enabling specific privacy settings (third-party cookies blocked, Do Not Track enabled, Enhanced Safe Browsing enabled), setting the download path to '/home/ga/Documents/Case_GoldenFleece/Evidence' with download prompts enabled, and setting the browser startup URLs to offshoreleaks.icij.org and opencorporates.com. All requirements explicitly match the prompt instructions and the verifier.py logic.
